历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: South China Normal University's minimum ranking in Xinjiang Science in 2023 was approximately 14,242, and in 2024 it rose significantly to about 7,712, moving forward by about 6,530 positions within one year, reflecting a notable increase in application popularity among Xinjiang Science candidates. Since admissions in 2021, 2022, and 2025 are not available, only the 2023-2024 two-year trend is used as reference; the 2024 ranking is already at a recent high. In 2023, the university enrolled 17 Science students, expanded to 23 in 2024, and plans to reduce to 13 in 2026, a decrease of 10 from 2024, a reduction of about 43.5%. The significant enrollment reduction will decrease admission slots, theoretically intensifying competition, but the ranking trend needs to be assessed in combination with other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable position in the 75-80 range in recent years, placing it among the top 100 universities nationwide and leading among normal universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (average), indicating moderate to low attention on short video platforms, without obvious signals of application heat. There are no records of historical abnormal admission data for South China Normal University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology was rated A+ (top in the country), Education and Physical Education were rated A-, and Marxist Theory was rated A. The A+ discipline in Psychology gives it a prominent advantage among normal universities nationwide, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal majors is generally stable, while basic disciplines like Computer Science and Mathematics maintain high attention due to the job market. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Xinjiang is about 238,000, a significant increase of about 211% from the combined total of 76,548 arts and science candidates in 2025. The surge in candidate numbers will markedly intensify competition across all levels of universities in the province. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and recruits across provinces. Its enrollment in Xinjiang is small (13-23 Science students), making it a small-scale admission, and ranking fluctuations are greatly influenced by the application decisions of a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline of the 2024 ranking having moved significantly forward to 7,712, the effect of the 2026 Science enrollment reduction from 23 to 13 (pushing the ranking number smaller), and the intensified competition across Xinjiang due to the surge in total candidates from about 77,000 to about 238,000 (pushing the ranking number larger), the enrollment reduction and candidate surge act in opposite directions. Given that the increase in candidate numbers far exceeds the reduction in enrollment, and the 2024 ranking is already at a recent peak, the 2026 Science ranking is expected to be approximately 5,751, with a range of 5,251 to 6,251.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5,751, range 5,251-6,251. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit (5,251) can focus on Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology (Normal) and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal); those around the middle of the range (near 5,751) are advised to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors; those near the upper limit (6,251) can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. Although South China Normal University's A+ Psychology discipline does not directly recruit in Xinjiang Science, it enhances the overall reputation of the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for South China Normal University in Xinjiang Liberal Arts was approximately 1100 in 2023, slightly shifting to about 1215 in 2024, with a backward movement of about 115 places over two years, remaining generally stable with a slight loosening. Since admissions data for 2021, 2022, and 2025 are not available, only the 2023-2024 trend is referenced; in 2023, 17 Liberal Arts students were enrolled, reduced to 11 in 2024, and the 2026 plan increases to 14, an increase of 3 students compared to 2024, an expansion rate of about 27.3%. The expansion will increase admission slots, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the ranking trend needs to be judged in combination with other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 75-80 range in recent years, belonging to the top 100 universities nationwide and ranking among the top in normal universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (average), with short video platform attention at a medium-low level. No abnormal historical admission records related to South China Normal University have been found, and the overall image of the school is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology received A+ (top in the country), Education and Physical Education received A-, and Marxist Theory received A.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal majors is generally stable, with traditional liberal arts normal majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Ideological and Political Education maintaining stable application popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Xinjiang ordinary college entrance examination is about 238,000, a significant increase of about 211% compared to the total of 76,548 liberal arts and science candidates in 2025, and the surge in candidate numbers will significantly intensify competition across all levels of universities in the province. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment institution. The number of Liberal Arts students enrolled in Xinjiang is small (11-17), making it a small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application decisions of individual high-scoring candidates. Among the Liberal Arts enrollment majors, Ideological and Political Education (Normal) is highly matched with the A-level Marxist Theory discipline, and Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) is closely related to the A- level Education discipline.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 ranking of 1215, the 2026 Liberal Arts plan increase from 11 to 14 (pushing the ranking number higher), and the surge in Xinjiang candidate numbers from about 77,000 to about 238,000 intensifying competition across the province (pushing the ranking number higher), both expansion and candidate surge point toward a backward shift in ranking. It is predicted that the 2026 Liberal Arts ranking will be approximately 1444, with a range of 1083-1805.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 1444, with a range of 1083-1805. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit (1083) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) and Ideological and Political Education (Normal); those with rankings around the middle (1444) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors like Geographic Science (Normal) and Finance; those near the upper limit (1805) can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. Although South China Normal University's A+ Psychology discipline does not directly enroll Liberal Arts students in Xinjiang, as the school's flagship discipline, it enhances the overall reputation and attractiveness of the university.
